title: ProDec Magnetic Paintbrush Holder with Integral Paint Can Opener, Twin Magnets For Resting Paint Brushes On Paint Cans, Compatible With All Types of Metal Tins
features: Magnetic clip that attaches to paint brush ferrules giving a quick and easy way to rest a brush and allow drips to fall back into the can
Conveniently attaches to the side of a paint can, kettle, scuttle or bucket via a strong spring-loaded clip
Vertical magnet angles brushes down into tin; horizontal magnet for tins filled to a higher level - works even when the magnets are covered in paint
30mm wide jaws compatible with virtually all paint cans
Also features integral paint can opener compatible with a wide range of lid types
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Nowhere to put your paint brush down without making a mess? Problem solved! Strong clip The strong, spring loaded clip ensures that once attached, this tool is going nowhere. The jaws are wide enough to cope with virtually any size of paint can, kettle or scuttle. Horizontal magnet For resting a brush at a shallow angle and keeping it to hand as soon as required. No need for precise placement - it grabs hold of your brush and even works when caked with paint. Vertical magnet For resting a brush at a steeper angle and allowing any paint to drip back into the can. Integral can opener Compatible with a wide range of lid types, it opens paint cans quickly and easily, saving you using - and potentially damaging - good screwdrivers, knives or other implements. Simple, effective... essential This incredibly useful tool solves the age-old problem of paint brushes slipping into the can and getting overloaded when you've balanced them on the rim. It also provides an ideal place to put your brush when working at height on platforms, ladders or scaffolding, giving you a free hand and enabling you to move and climb up or down safely. It uses a simple magnet that grabs and holds onto the brush's steel ferrule, giving a quick and easy way to rest the brush when not in use and allowing drips to fall back into the can. A strong spring-loaded clip with 30mm wide jaws enables it to quickly and easily attach onto the side of virtually any paint can, kettle, scuttle or bucket. There are two magnets that work even when covered with paint: one vertical that angles the brush down into tin when the paint level is lower, and one horizontal that ensures that the brush isn't submerged into the tin when it's still full to a higher level. The opener also features an integral 'half coin' can opener that is compatible with a wide range of lids. The vast majority of paint bushes have a stainless steel ferrule that is compatible with magnets, but note that the product will not work with paint brushes that have ferrules made from copper, other non-ferrous metals or plastic. PRODEC: THE COMPLETE DECORATING SOLUTION - ProDec has all the tools you need for a trade quality job, from preparation and protection through to application and cleaning up Brushes Whatever the paint or surface, ProDec has a brush for every situation. From flat brushes to angled brushes, long reach brushes to fine detail brushes, masonry brushes to block brushes, papering brushes to dusting brushes, we've got everything you need for a smooth trade finish. Rollers Cage rollers, mini rollers, padded rollers and double arm rollers are available in a wide range of trade quality fabrics that suit emulsion, masonry, gloss, satin, primer, undercoat, woodstains and more. Rugged frames and sturdy extension poles help you paint quickly and effectively. Tools From scraping to filling, smoothing to caulking, cutting to pasting and much more, ProDec has the tools to help you prepare surfaces before painting for a long lasting finish, and get outstanding results with wallpaper. Tapes ProDec's range of quality masking tapes protect surfaces and give crisp paint lines for a high quality finish, saving time and mess. Standard grades are available for everyday use, low tack grades for delicate surfaces and UV resistant grades for hotspots. Dust Sheets & Tarpaulins Our range of cotton and polythene dust sheets, self-adhesive films and barrier sheets keeps floors and furniture protected from spills and splashes during the job and helps minimise dust transfer between working areas. Abrasives Good painting starts with good preparation, and ProDec has everything you need to get your surfaces in tiptop condition. We've got a range of trade quality abrasive papers for sanding, steel wool and wire brushes for cleaning, as well as tack cloths to remove dust. Maintenance Whatever the job, ProDec has all the essentials you need, from wiping to polishing, sweeping up to collecting waste. Our range includes cloths, rags, sponges, brooms, rubble sacks, paint kettles and more. Painters' Workwear ProDec has a wide range of professional decorating workwear, including painters' trousers, shorts and the classic bib & brace. Available in a choice of hardwearing fabrics, they are carefully designed and tailored for a comfortable fit, with multiple storage pockets to keep essential tools close at hand.
